item.title: RT @SpaceX: Starship and Super Heavy move out to continue preflight testing https://t.co/zYN1fkvNIk

item.title:
RT @Yuchenj_UW: MiniMax M2.7 is open-source!
The most interesting part of its blog is the “model’s ...
item.description:
RT @Yuchenj_UW: MiniMax M2.7 is open-source!
The most interesting part of its blog is the “model’s self-evolution.”
It’s essentially Karp…
--- @MiniMax_AI | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 9 | 💬 0 | 👁 0
item.author: @MiniMax_AI

item.title:
MiniMax M2.7 is now live on @ollama's cloud.
Open-source, licensed for commercial use, and running...
item.description:
MiniMax M2.7 is now live on @ollama's cloud.
Open-source, licensed for commercial use, and running with a single command.
Huge thanks to the @ollama team for the Day-0 support. 🙌
--- @MiniMax_AI | ❤️ 58 | 🔁 7 | 💬 5 | 👁 2438
item.author: @MiniMax_AI

item.title: Also can find on modelScope. https://t.co/Eh9PimiY1R
